creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Port does not build and has invalid icons/hicolor/32x32/mimetypes in plist:

	checking dependency style of cc... gcc3
	checking for intltool >= 0.31... ./configure: intltool-update: not found
	 found
	configure: error: Your intltool is too old.  You need intltool 0.31 or later.
	===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.


	...

	===>   Registering installation for freedink-dfarc-3.2.1_5
	pkg: lstat(/usr/local/icons/hicolor/32x32/mimetypes/): No such file or directory
	pkg: DEVELOPER_MODE: Plist error: @dirrm icons/hicolor/32x32/mimetypes
